# AUTO-GENERATED scripted_guis — do not edit by hand
# One triplet per innovation key

# innovation_battlements
DI_remove_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_battlements
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_battlements
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_battlements = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_battlements
	}
}

	}

}

	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_rightful_ownership
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_rightful_ownership = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_rightful_ownership
	}
}

			add_innovation = innovation_horse_armor

	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_horse_armor = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_horse_armor
	}
}

		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			remove_innovation = innovation_black_marsh_natives
		}
	}
}

DI_add_innovation_black_marsh_natives = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
			add_innovation = innovation_black_marsh_natives
		}
	}
}

DI_culture_has_innovation_black_marsh_natives = {
	scope = culture
	is_valid = {
		has_innovation = innovation_black_marsh_natives
	}
}
